data.title: AGM for DFDS A/S being held, notice issued for shareholders. Keep an eye out for info on date, time, and location.
data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. The labor force participation rate also increased to 62.7%, with an addition of 200,000 jobs in the last month alone. The job market seems to be steadily improving as more and more people are finding employment opportunities. This positive trend is expected to continue in the coming months as the economy shows signs of recovery from the impact of the recent global events.

Morgan Stanley moves Capgemini from Underweight to Equal Weight.
Egypt backs the Peace Council and the work of the Gaza Management Committee, says Foreign Minister.
India plans to manufacture domestic permanent magnets by the end of the year, says Mines Minister.

data.title: Hafnia's Q4/FY 2025 results to be disclosed on 26th Feb 2026 with a 07:30 CET release. Investor presentation at 14:30 CET. CEO, CFO, VP, and EVP to lead.
data.description: Singapore-based company, Hafnia Limited, will announce its Q4 / FY 2025 results on February 26, 2026, around 07:30 CET. The OSE ticker code for the company is "HAFNI", while its NYSE ticker code is "HAFN". The investor presentation will feature CEO Mikael Skov, CFO Perry van Echtelt, VP Søren Skibdal Winther, and EVP Thomas Andersen. The event will take place on the same day in Oslo, Norway, at 14:30 local time.

data.title: January 2026 ferry freight volume stable at 3.3m lane metres, 1.2% higher than 2025, 0.5% decrease adjusting for route changes.
data.description: In January 2026, the total volume of ferry freight reached 3.3 million lane metres, showing a 1.2% increase compared to the previous year. However, when adjusted for route changes, there was a slight decrease of 0.5% from the previous year.

Orange reveals its new strategy "Trust the future", focusing on trust for growth. #Orange #TrustTheFuture
Solid financial results in 2025 meeting forecasts. ISS announces DKK 2.5 billion share repurchase plan.

data.title: Nilfisk reports improved competitive position in 2025 with growth and cost improvements. CEO Jon Sintorn cites focused execution and strategic roadmap, resulting in a more robust and competitive company.
data.description: The CEO of Nilfisk, Jon Sintorn, reflected on the company's performance in 2025 as a year marked by concentrated execution and defined objectives. Despite a difficult economic backdrop, Nilfisk achieved business growth and significant enhancements in its cost structure by the year-end. Sintorn emphasized the team's customer-centric approach, bolstering of cost efficiency, and unwavering commitment to their strategic plan. These efforts have rendered Nilfisk more resilient, competitive, and well-equipped for the times ahead. Financially, the company made notable progress, though specific numbers were not disclosed.

data.title: Pernod Ricard CEO prioritizes brand strength, efficiency, and cash generation in 2026, aiming for sustainable growth.
data.description: In a press release dated February 19, 2026, Alexandre Ricard, the Chairman and CEO of a company located in Paris, emphasized the organization's key objectives. He highlighted the need to enhance brand appeal to ensure sustained growth, improve operational efficiency, and increase cash flow. The company's diverse range of brands, global presence, and motivated workforce provide a competitive advantage in adapting to a challenging market and capitalizing on opportunities.

data.title: Revizto secures UK Ministry of Defence accreditation, solidifying AECO data protection. Feb 19, 2026, Lausanne.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Lausanne, Switzerland, Revizto, a premier collaboration platform for the Architecture, Engineering, Construction & Operations (AECO) sector, successfully obtained the Secure by Design (SbD) First Line Assessment certification from the UK. This accreditation underscores Revizto's commitment to security and highlights its position as a trusted industry leader.
Philippines central bank sets benchmark rate at 4.25%, correcting earlier message indicating no change.

data.title: In 2026, Ethereum Foundation prioritizes 'quantum readiness' and increased gas limits after a productive 2025 with major upgrades.
data.description: In 2025, the Ethereum Foundation described the year as one of its most successful, with notable achievements including two key network upgrades and a substantial increase in the gas limit.

KBW increases Travelers’ target from $320 to $340.

data.title: Trump family invites financial leaders to Mar-a-Lago crypto mixer, attracting 200 crypto and finance execs, along with regulators and lawmakers.
data.description: A recent gathering hosted by the Trump family's cryptocurrency platform brought together numerous industry leaders from the crypto and finance sectors. The event, held in Florida, provided a platform for executives to engage with regulators and Congressional members. The attendance included a significant number of high-profile individuals from these sectors, indicating a strong interest and support for the Trump family's initiative.
